-- 4 of 7 --

In this lesson, I’ll teach you how to approach your
audience when they don’t make that purchase the first
time they see your ads or marketing content.
Audiences We Will Target
• 	Visited IG Page
• 	IG Page Engagers
• 	IG Page Messagers
• 	IF Post Saves
• 	Visited FB Page
• 	FB Page Engagers
• 	FB CTA CLicks
• 	FB Page Messagers
• 	FB Saved Page Post
Unconvinced customers eventually buy for two
reasons:
• 	Price
• 	A recommendation from someone they trust
Re-Engagement Ad Tips
• 	Speak to your value props
• 	Let your customers do the highlighting
• 	Make it authentic
LESSON:
RE-ENGAGEMENT (MIDDLE
FUNNEL)
MODULE:
SCALING WITH

ACTION ITEM
❏ 	Evaluate your re-engagement creative:
❏ 	Are you clear enough about why people should
use your product?
❏ 	Are you letting your customers do the talking?
